name: HONEYWELL INTERNATIONAL INC
summary: Honeywell International Inc is a diversified industrial technology company operating across four segments: Aerospace Technologies (avionics, propulsion, defense systems), Industrial Automation (sensing, process solutions, warehouse automation), Building Automation (building products and solutions), and Energy and Sustainability Solutions (UOP refining/petrochemical technologies). The company serves commercial aviation, defense, industrial, and energy markets globally, offering both hardware products and software-enabled services.

products.name: Commercial Aviation OEM Systems
products.description: Original equipment avionics and aerospace systems for commercial aircraft manufacturers

products.name: Commercial Aviation Aftermarket
products.description: Aftermarket parts, repairs, and upgrades for commercial aviation customers

products.name: Defense Services
products.description: Defense systems and services for military and government customers

products.name: Sensing and Safety Technologies
products.description: Sensors and safety devices for industrial automation applications

products.name: Productivity Products
products.description: Productivity-enhancing devices and tools for industrial and warehouse environments

products.name: Process Solutions
products.description: Automation and control solutions for industrial process industries

products.name: Warehouse and Workflow Solutions
products.description: Warehouse automation and workflow optimization systems

products.name: Building Products
products.description: HVAC, fire, security, and building control products

products.name: Building Solutions
products.description: Building automation installation, maintenance, and energy management services

products.name: UOP
products.description: Refining, petrochemical, and gas processing technologies and catalysts

partnerships.description: Honeywell has environmental liability arrangements with Resideo following prior spin-off
Acquired Air Products' Liquified Natural Gas Process Technology and Equipment Business in September 2024
Acquired Carrier's Global Access Solutions Business in June 2024
Acquired Johnson Matthey's Catalyst Technologies Business Segment in June 2025
